message:
release: workspace minor-version bump — 11 crates to 0.2.0, fsfs to 1.3.0, frankensearch binary to 0.3.0

Coordinated release across the entire workspace to ship the changes landed in the preceding commits on this branch:

  frankensearch-core       0.1.2 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-durability 0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-embed      0.1.3 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-fsfs       1.2.5 → 1.3.0   (independent pre-existing major)
  frankensearch-fusion     0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-index      0.1.2 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-lexical    0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-ops        0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-rerank     0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-storage    0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch-tui        0.1.0 → 0.2.0
  frankensearch (bin)      0.1.0 → 0.3.0

Semver reasoning:

- Every library crate jumps to 0.2.0 because multiple carry a breaking surface on THIS release: frankensearch-core changes canonicalized markdown output bytes (golden-sensitive downstream); frankensearch-ops extends the search_events.phase CHECK to include 'reranked' so migrations must be regenerated; frankensearch-rerank picks up a post-ort-API-shape signature on Session::builder chaining. Bundling them as a single 0.2.0 means downstream consumers don't pay three separate breaking bumps in a row.

- frankensearch-fsfs jumps 1.2.5 → 1.3.0 (minor, not major) because the change here is purely additive: two new golden files pin the explanation payload v1 shape. No FSFS API surface change.

- frankensearch (binary) jumps 0.1.0 → 0.3.0 to stay one ahead of its library dep wave, matching the convention elsewhere in the Frankensuite family where the CLI binary carries a distinct version track from the libraries.

No Cargo.lock update is included — the workspace uses version.workspace = true resolution and Cargo will refresh the lock at next cargo build locally; the .lockfile is regenerated by CI on each release build.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-core"
-version = "0.1.2"
+version = "0.2.0"
 description = "Core traits, types, and error types for frankensearch"
 edition.workspace = true
 license-file.workspace = true
